reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely amazing! I like the papers please aesthetic. I just finished the game but I wish they could add an endless mode. Overall peak game!

I just finished the game and i can definitely see myself coming back to play again. Right from the get go the world building was great from knowing the robots and the world itself is there to ragebait you. The comedy and story isnt too much or too little. Overall its probably the best story game ive played on vr. Fulfilled the papers please vr itch ive been needing.
Game of the year love the graphics and the story of the game.
Great game and story but I'm not done yet
The game is so fun and the robots in your house are good but I wish they make a endless mode .

I have a few problems with this. First off, I just want the core gameplay. I don't want to talk to these morons in unskippable tutorials for an hour. Second off, there is a very annoying problem in which I cannot see the contraband items in the storage compartments. I would open one, see nothing in it and then it would yell at me whenever there was clearly nothing in it. I played this with MQ+ and this month seems to be weaker than the previous ones. Seriously, stop with the hand holding and let me play the game. I don't need Nevus telling me about Internet memes.

UPDATE: 
After playing this for a good bit I have to admit it's growing on me. The household appliance characters are funny and I'm starting to like them, the gameplay improved significantly, the gangster bot who comes through I like to help him with his cupcakes and that makes it more fun and my Mentor's conspiracies are actually getting interesting. This game is definitely getting better after the VERY slow start. Also it is WAY too easy to do things accidentally and control and items finally started appearing. Also explain to me how a bot with an explosive is cleared to go in but a Leggy can't read a dang book?!?!?

I was really enjoying this game, but I encountered a bug on day 6 and am unable to continue. I started a second game and had the same issue. I contacted support and it sounds like I'm just stuck.

Their response: 
Unfortunately, due to the time elapsed since the game was launched, we don't have any dedicated active development teams available, but we can confirm that we have received and recorded your report.

That said, we do apologise that you have encountered this problem and we do appreciate the effort that you have made to provide us with this now recorded information as we may use it to revise and resume development in the future

This just made me think of all the problems with ICE and immigration right now. Don’t let the red robots travel…. It just felt very racist without being technically racist. This was not at all fun and actually seemed very problematic. Immediately deleted it.

I am enjoying the game so much. The graphics, main mechanics and humor is spot on for me. It's not too complicated but it keeps you focused and relaxed. I needed a game to spend my short and irregular free time and this hits the spot.

It has a few bugs though, sometimes you can't grab stuff and need to quit the game and go back in again. A bit annoying but nothing too serious.

10/10.

The start of the game is a little too long and when the watch is ringing I had no idea what that sound was and didn't know what to do..
When you start checking robot I'd I got bored on the 3rd robot. I think it would be a great game for kids.
Absolutely amazing I really wish that they didn’t endless mode, but the game is the best game I’ve ever played on VR so far
I just want to play the game. The game just wants to talk at me for about as twice as long as it wants to let me actually play.

I love the challenges  in the game and￼ the lack of  glitches and the story but the game was way to short I fell like it had a lot of potential for a sequel. 


I beat the game in three days
You can't skip the nonsensical talking and find ur just stood waiting. I play VR to play not wait
Son spent the whole time checking people in and out of a city. Felt like he couldn’t do anything else and thought it was boring.

I loved the characters and the different tools, but it really needs a mode to keep going after beating the game. The story was perfect, the gameplay was perfect, the different scenarios were perfect but there needs to be an endless mode else it would get repetitive.
I played for a couple minutes and I got soooooooo bored it’s just not interesting
I enjoyed papers please, this feels just like it but in Vr pretty fun
Tedious intro so didn't bother

How did this cute little robot game single handedly bring me through 5 stages of grief, accomplishment, betrayal, frustration, confusion, fear, depression, another 5 stages of grief and finally making me the happiest or saddest man depending on the ending, great game, would recommend.

Has great gameplay, yes there’s lots of talking but it’s a game that has an underlying story, the quirky comments are part of it, and make it more enjoyable! Once you get passed the tutorial you learn new gameplay mechanics and such it’s a version of papers please with a futuristic twist which is just fun
My god, this game is just "Papers Please" remade for VR

I very much love this game. great story I just really wish that there was an endless mode because it would make it amazing and not the one where it's just continuous spots like I'd work a day and end today it'd be fun I really wish it had that
What was the reason for adding a “dating” category on the screen you go to watch the news ???🤨

I love this game. I have completed it and loved every second! I would love to see an endless mode where you could select certain settings or randomize them. Since there’s nothing else to do after completing the game it would be nice to have unlimited shifts. I would also love to see a sequel or continuation of the story since I still have a few questions about certain characters

I was really enjoying this, but got to the point where it put the speed clock on—and I’m done. If I have to scramble, I might as well be on the clock on a real job. You’d get a lot of additional buyers among older, slower people like me if you just added a lazy employee option so we could go at our own pace.  Seated position is way high up and makes it hard to reach things, especially in a hurry. I would love to be able to keep playing if I could keep up, but as it is—I’m going to have to reluctantly return it.

Great game but rather buggy. Wasn't able to put on the Fortitude gloves for a while. Had to restart several times.
In spite of all that, the game is full of charm and I really like the controls. I appreciate the details and especially liked the idea of a portable radio (though I wish it wouldn't stop working once it's respawned).
I also do wish we were sent home at the end of the day to start the new day ourselves like I thought would happen given the tutorial and the sleep button, but instead the new day starts at the end of our shift.

In the beginning there is a lot of talking making it really boring at the start. After that you realise that every bot is the same for every person. I watch a couple videos before I brought it and thought why not get it. I then get tired of stand and bored after many cutscenes. At one point I got halfway through and it just crashed. All that work was gone and I had to do it all again. This took me like 30 minutes to get through the beginning but and after that it just got boring 

Overall:
A lot of bugs and a lot of talking

I was excited for this game becuase it reminded me of some of the old greats like Job Simulator. But the controls are a MESS. Please Devs…what is going on?! I start the game and immediately the bugginess hits me. I can’t press the buttons on the on screen menus. I fiddle and fiddle and fiddle and then finally I get to the next screen. Great! But no…I had selected “sitting” in the settings menu and that was a bust. The orientation is completely off and everything is too high, in the wrong place, etc. No matter how I change my boundary this game just ignores all common sense and puts you in the most uncomfortable possible position to play it. Perhaps the seated mode is glitched and just doesn’t work. But why launch that way?

Look, I loved the opening! It was so cool to see the apartment scene and the comedy is fun so far. I’m looking forward to seeing how the story progresses. And I’m having fun with what is there so far. Very creative stuff! There is so much potential to do cut-ins like the opening scene to keep the player engaged as the game goes on. 

But none of it matters if the controls or seated mode don’t work properly. Please update!
Please make an endless mode. I don’t want to stop playing.
The more I play this the more I enjoy it! I love the toaster, and the city you live in. The details are great, and I love the original gameplay found here. Very charming, very fun.

I’m positive that you will love this game if you’re a big fnaf fan at first it’s pretty easy but once you get to day 4 you have a nightmare of a level and after that it’s new features almost every level

reviews.review_title: WTH is wrong with my game
reviews.review_description: I acnt grab anything and i restarted my game 2 times
This game has amazing graphics and an amazing story! I just finished the game and still have more to go! THEY NEED TO MAKE A SECOND GAME!!! WE NEED IT!
This is the same game that had a demo of it on steam 7 years ago, I am glad to see it did come out eventually.
The game would not let me put on the gloves
BluSkuler is a moron
Fun when you actually do the game but too much story
Very nice
So. I DON'T GET IT  So literally  get it right. And it says it's wrong Worst  game of the year

I bought this pre-launch since it’s totally my type of game.
Y’all KILLED IT!!! 

I absolutely LOVE THIS; it’s just the right amount of challenge, the controls work fabulously and the story line is compelling! 
And let’s not forget the adorable robots! 

It’s a HIT and I’ll be recommending this to everyone I know!
Great game does anyone know how to make the desk higher
5 STARS!!
Had lots of fun beating it.
I highly recommend this game and loved every  moment of it you should get.

reviews.review_title: Amazing game, gets kinda hectic at times
reviews.review_description:
I love this game, the news was just detail that added so much personality to the game, and I find it convenient when you play you don't just get throw into the booth, my only problems were: 
The timed level which I kind of rage quit at, and the barcode scanner, which kind of overwhelmed me with all the tools.

Team 17 is definitely reliable when it comes to their games, but this is.... something else. It's good for what it is. It has decent graphics and above decent voice acting. Plus, getting involved in the humorous conversations and arguments is pretty nice. But overall, It's you go to work and come back. rinse and repeat. It would be cool if there was more to explore and do. If you could explore some shops instead of buy stuff on a screen that pops up, or if you could actually fly people to work instead of checking if they're good to go, that would be so cool. You could get caught up in some funny stuff, but I expected to buy a game, not a movie. It's pretty fun, but could be better.
Very fun

I got the game because I saw a bunch of YouTubers play it soooo.... I got it and it was super fun the story is thrilling and the graphics are really good and it's very addictive. Also, definitely needs a sequel or endless mode. If they add an endless mode you should be able to change the settings to make it how you want it to be other than that I 💯% recommend
Really good game if you want a game like job sim but better here it is all I can say is GET IT!
5 stars dident even play the game yet but I know it is 5 stars from a wolf in vr check him out too

Need to play more for full review but love it so far.
b i t , l y / b o r d e r b o t s

reviews.review_title: I really like it so far
reviews.review_description: I saw this game while scrolling through the store to find a new game and decided to buy it, and I’m glad I did. It’s simple and fun with an interesting story. I love the character design and their personalities. I haven’t played through the entire game yet, but I can’t wait to see the ending! The developers did a really good job and I’m glad I decided to get this game.

This is one of my favorite games out of every game I’ve played but there are some minor bugs not game breaking and I still remember when they released the beta to a bunch of YouTubers to review the games trajectory has changed so much and what happened to the robot next to the leggy in the cover
Awesome

I only played this game for 2 hours and I love it the zombie robots the coolest night shift ever I pre orderd this game and it’s so cool! I hope you will make another one because I’m going to finish the first one fast lol also one more thing when I wake up I shower and pretend to drink code and eat breakfast while watching the news this is a fun game 
100 present recommend

I am glad I purchased this game for my Quest 3, it's easy to jump into and the bots are very unique. The game has excellent humor too. 

If you want to check it out, try  tiny,cc/Bbref
It's a good game a lift up to my expectations although I did run into some glitches but besides that it's really fun and great for content
I have played this game for maybe 30 minutes and I already love it it is a must get for the price I would say it is worth at least $35-$45

Bravo developers! Very fun guys. If u need some practice up on your multitasking or hav adhd  get this one!! I am severely and hate having timer it get frazzled easy 😬but actually getting better the further along! 😁 the only small thing I wish they would add is no timer so sandbox mode and or a height level where u hav options other then standing sitting. Caus I hav had issues with my guardian too tall or too short so maybe make movable by grabbing, and i do wish the radio could b turned off only one time for whole time playing.  Partially deaf and its honestly a pain and kinda dampens the experience for me😒That's all thooo fun game highly recommended!!                                                       Adding my  25% off code in my bio, and  then u hav no reason not to get this game even tho it is worth mor then what it is!! 😁Way to go devs on this gem🥰EDIT  add on : after playing tge first infected robot level 2 time at the end doesn't end w showing leaderboard where u end level to go bk to apt. U just sit there for while then hav to quit 2 menu but also when u do u hav to do level again even tho u beat it?? So just letting knw if other hav issues w same thing.
